extensionName.message: Clipboard History Manager - Secure, Fast, and Open Source
extensionName.description: Extension title shown in extension management and Web Store.

extensionDescription.message: Powerful clipboard history manager. Save, search & organize everything you copy. Tags, shortcuts & unlimited storage.
extensionDescription.description: Extension description shown in extension management and Web Store.

commonChangelog.description: Title for tooltip for button that redirects user to the Chrome extension's version history and changelog.

commonSupportDevelopment.description: Title for tooltip for button that redirects user to the Chrome extension's donation page.

commonHelpAndFeedback.description: Title for tooltip for button that redirects user to the Chrome extension's support hub.

commonFloatingMode.description: Title for tooltip for button that opens the Chrome extension in a separate window.

commonStorageUsage.description: Title for tooltip and heading for the view that shows how much storage the clipboard history is using.

commonSettings.description: Title for tooltip for button that opens the Chrome extension's settings.

commonProfile.description: Title for tooltip for button that opens a menu with various actions relating to the user's profile.

commonManageSubscription.description: Label for the menu item that opens the page where the user manages their paid subscription.

commonSignOut.description: Label for the menu item that signs the user out of their account.

commonOpenWebApp.description: Label for the menu item that opens the web version of the application in a new browser tab.

commonAll.description: Label for the tab that lists every clipboard history item.

commonFavorites.description: Label for the tab that lists clipboard history items the user has marked as favorite.

commonCloud.description: Label for the tab that lists clipboard history items synced to the cloud.

commonSearchPlaceholder.description: Placeholder text for the search input in the main popup.

commonCopied.description: Badge or notification indicating text was copied.

contextMenuPaste.description: Title for the top-level context menu.

contextMenuAll.description: Title for the 'All' items context submenu.

listSelectedCount.description: Status text displaying how many items are selected out of the total.

listDeleteConfirmTitle.description: Title for the confirm deletion modal.

listDeleteConfirmMessage.message: Are you sure you want to delete all selected items? Favorited items will not be deleted.

navNavigate.description: Keyboard hint label for navigating entries.

navCopy.description: Keyboard hint label for copying an entry.

navClearSearch.description: Keyboard hint label for clearing search.

tagsCreateHeader.description: Header for creating a new tag.

tagsEmptyHint.message: Start typing to create a new tag
tagsEmptyHint.description: Hint text when no matching tags are found.

overlayEmptyTitle.description: Title when history has no entries.

overlayEmptySubtitle.message: Copy any text to see it here
overlayEmptySubtitle.description: Subtitle when history has no entries.

overlayNoResultsTitle.description: Title when search returns no results.

overlayNoFavoritesTitle.description: Title when favorites tab is empty.

overlayNoFavoritesSubtitlePrefix.message: Mark an item as favorite by clicking on

overlayNoFavoritesDescription.message: Favorite items are protected from deletion

overlayNoCloudTitle.message: You have no items stored in the cloud
overlayNoCloudTitle.description: Title when cloud tab is empty.

overlayNoCloudSubtitlePrefix.message: Store an item in the cloud by clicking on
overlayNoCloudSubtitlePrefix.description: Subtitle instructions for storing items in cloud.

overlayNoCloudDescription.message: Items stored in the cloud can be accessed from other devices
overlayNoCloudDescription.description: Footer explanation about cloud sync benefit.

overlayOfflineSubtitle.message: Connect to the internet to access Clipboard History IO Pro.
overlayOfflineSubtitle.description: Subtitle for offline notice in Cloud page.

cloudPromoTitle.description: Heading for Cloud Pro promotion page.

cloudPromoSubtitle.message: Securely sync and manage your clipboard history across all your devices with Clipboard History IO Pro!
cloudPromoSubtitle.description: Subtitle for Cloud Pro promotion page.

cloudPromoTrial.message: Get started now with a limited-time 1-month free trial, cancellable anytime!

cloudPromoGetStarted.description: Button to start Pro subscription/sign in.

cloudPromoSupportText.message: Your subscription helps cover cloud provider costs and supports the continued development and maintenance of CHIO!

cloudActionDuplicateErrorLocal.message: A copy of this item is already stored locally.
cloudActionDuplicateErrorLocal.description: Notification when item already exists in local storage.

cloudActionDuplicateErrorCloud.message: A copy of this item is already stored in the cloud.
cloudActionDuplicateErrorCloud.description: Notification when item already exists in cloud storage.

userMenuGetMobileApp.description: Menu item link to mobile app.

signInSuccessText.message: Success! You may close this window.

signInTitleStep0.message: Sign in to Clipboard History IO Pro

signInSubtitleStep0.message: Welcome! Please enter your email to continue

signInSubtitleStep1.message: to continue to Clipboard History IO Pro

signInContinueButton.description: Button to submit email or code.

editModalDateCopied.description: Header for last copied date statistic.

commonUnsavedChanges.description: Warning message when form is dirty.

shortcutsModalDescription.message: Assign a keyboard shortcut to this item. To customize shortcuts, visit

shortcutsModalNotSet.description: Fallback text when no key shortcut is bound.

mergeModalMerging.description: Label before item count in merge modal.

mergeModalInverseOrder.description: Button label to invert merge list order.

mergeModalDeleteSourceItems.description: Checkbox to delete original items after merge.

storageUsagePerformanceDescription.message: The extension supports unlimited storage and is optimized to handle large collections efficiently, but performance may degrade with excessive items. Removing old entries helps maintain optimal speed.
storageUsagePerformanceDescription.description: Explanation of storage impact on extension speed.

settingsBlankItemsTitle.description: Setting title for allowing blank items.

settingsBlankItemsDesc.message: Allow blank items to be added to the clipboard history.
settingsBlankItemsDesc.description: Setting description for allowing blank items.

settingsStorageLocTitle.description: Setting title for default storage location.

settingsStorageLocDesc.message: Select where new items are stored. When offline or not subscribed to Pro, this setting is ignored and new items will be stored locally.
settingsStorageLocDesc.description: Setting description for default storage location.

settingsTotalBadgeDesc.message: Show number of items in the clipboard history on the extension icon.

settingsContextMenuTitle.description: Setting title for context menu pasting.

settingsContextMenuDesc.message: Enable pasting clipboard history items from the context menu.
settingsContextMenuDesc.description: Setting description for context menu pasting.

settingsChangelogIndDesc.message: Display an indicator on the changelog button if the extension was updated since the changelog was last viewed.

settingsDefaultTabDesc.message: Select the tab shown when the extension is opened.

settingsDisplayModeDesc.message: Select how the extension opens when clicking the icon. Changing this will close the extension.

settingsThemeSystem.description: Theme option with dynamic system mode name.

settingsLocalLimitTitle.description: Setting title for local item limit.

settingsLocalLimitDesc.message: Set the maximum number of non-favorited items that will be stored locally.
settingsLocalLimitDesc.description: Setting description for local item limit.

settingsLocalCharLimitTitle.description: Setting title for local character limit.

settingsLocalCharLimitDesc.message: Set the maximum number of characters an item may have before it's ignored by the clipboard monitor and not added to the clipboard history.
settingsLocalCharLimitDesc.description: Setting description for local character limit.

settingsImportDesc.message: Select a file to import items from. Only files exported from this extension and the old Clipboard History Pro are supported.

settingsImportSuccess.message: Items were successfully imported from the selected file.

settingsImportError.message: The selected file could not be processed. Please try again with another file.

settingsExportDesc.message: Back up or transfer your clipboard history by exporting it to a file.

settingsCloudOfflineDesc.message: Connect to the internet to access cloud settings.
settingsCloudOfflineDesc.description: Notice when offline on cloud tab.

settingsCloudGetStartedTitle.description: Header when user is not subscribed to Pro on cloud settings tab.

settingsCloudGetStartedDesc.message: Subscribe to Clipboard History IO Pro to access cloud settings.
settingsCloudGetStartedDesc.description: Instructions to subscribe on cloud settings tab.

settingsCloudLimitTitle.description: Setting title for cloud item limit.

settingsCloudLimitDesc.message: Set the maximum number of non-favorited items that will be stored in the cloud.
settingsCloudLimitDesc.description: Setting description for cloud item limit.

errorModalMessage.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again. If the issue persists, consider submitting a bug report to help us resolve it.
